_description: Curated additions on top of config/companies.json. The plugin merges these with the AI 50 list at run time, deduping by name (so overlap with AI 50 is harmless — the 4 overlaps from Scaling Europe 50 are: Legora, Lovable, Mistral AI, n8n).

_source_blocks.scaling_europe_50: https://scalingeurope.co.uk/ — top 50 fastest-growing EU tech companies. Detected ATS coverage: 32/50 (25 ashby + 7 greenhouse). 18 are 'skip' until fetchers exist for their ATS — see each entry's _note.

_runtime_behaviour: Entries with ats='skip' are ignored by fetch-and-diff.py. Entries duplicating a name in companies.json are skipped (companies.json wins). Entries can be removed at any time; entries can also be added (e.g. via 'validate favorites' to detect ATS for a new company).

name: Adfin
_note: ATS not auto-detected (probed Ashby, Greenhouse, Lever, Personio, Workable, Recruitee — none matched). Likely a smaller EU ATS (JazzHR, Smartrecruiters, Teamtailor, Pinpoint, etc.) or a custom careers page. Visit the company's website, identify the ATS via dev-tools network tab, and update the entry.

name: Aikido Security
_note: Likely uses recruitee. Detected at recruitee.com/aikidosecurity with 44 active listings. The plugin doesn't yet have a recruitee fetcher in scripts/fetch-and-diff.py — to enable: add a fetch_recruitee() / normalise_recruitee() pair following the existing fetch_ashby/fetch_greenhouse pattern, then change ats to 'recruitee' here.

name: Asap.Work
_note: Likely uses recruitee. Detected at recruitee.com/asap with 17 active listings. The plugin doesn't yet have a recruitee fetcher in scripts/fetch-and-diff.py — to enable: add a fetch_recruitee() / normalise_recruitee() pair following the existing fetch_ashby/fetch_greenhouse pattern, then change ats to 'recruitee' here.
